Sound familiar?

Why good candidates ghost you

You are sending emails. They are ignoring them. Here is why your current outreach is not working.

📧

Generic emails get ignored

Candidates receive dozens of templated emails a week. Yours looks exactly like everyone else's. They do not even open it.

⏳

No urgency, no action

Without a reason to act now, candidates put it off. By the time they get round to it the opportunity has gone or they have taken another role.

📞

Phone calls go unanswered

Cold calling candidates works less and less. People screen unknown numbers and never call back. You need a better way to reach them.

How VoiceReach works

From CV to booked interview in minutes

01
📄

Upload the CV

Drop in a PDF or Word doc. AI reads it instantly and pulls their name, experience, skills and last employer automatically.

02
✏️

Review the script

Add the job title and salary. A personalised script is generated instantly. Read it, tweak it if needed, then approve it.

03
🎙

Voice note generated

An AI voice reads the script naturally. Sent via branded email with a big play button. No clunky attachments.

04
📅

Interview booked

Candidates click the 24-hour interview link, hear something personal and book straight into your calendar. Done.

What they actually hear

A message that feels genuinely personal

Every word is generated from their actual CV. Their name, their experience, their last employer, the specific role. Nothing generic. Nothing templated.

🎯

References their actual experience

Mentions their years in the field, their last employer and why that makes them right for this specific role.

⚡

Creates real urgency

The 24-hour interview link makes them feel like this is a real opportunity that will not wait around.

✅

You approve it before it goes

Read the script in the dashboard. Edit anything you want. Then hit send. You are always in control.

Sample voice note script
"Hi David... I hope you are well today. I have just had your CV come across my desk and the timing is perfect. We have a brand new Fleet Operations Manager role, paying 45 thousand pounds, and honestly, with your 12 years in fleet management, you are exactly what this client is looking for. Your time at DHL Logistics is a brilliant fit for what they need. I have created a personal interview link just for you. You can do the interview right now, it takes less than ten minutes. But do not leave it too long David, this one is moving fast. Click the link, do the interview, and let us get you this job."
28 seconds · Generated in 3 seconds · 0.47mb
The results

Numbers that matter to recruiters

3x
More interviews booked
Recruiters using VoiceReach are booking three times more interviews compared to email-only outreach. Candidates respond when they hear something personal.
84%
Email open rate
A subject line that says "we left you a personal voice message" gets opened. Average industry email open rate is under 20%. Ours is over 80%.
55%
Interview conversion
Of candidates who click play on their voice note, over half go on to book an interview. The personalisation creates a connection before you even speak.
~9p
Cost per voice note
Each personalised voice note costs around 9p to generate and send, dropping on higher volume plans. The ROI on a single placed candidate makes this one of the most cost-effective tools in recruitment.
Features

Everything a recruiter needs, nothing they do not

🤖

AI CV extraction

Upload any CV. Name, experience, skills, companies and location are pulled out automatically. No manual data entry.

🎙

Personalised voice notes

Every note references the candidate by name, their specific experience, last employer and the exact role. Nothing generic.

✏️

Script preview and edit

Read and edit the script before it goes out. You always approve what gets said before hitting send.

📧

Branded email delivery

A clean branded email goes out with a big play button for the voice note and a 24-hour interview link attached.

📅

Calendar integration

Candidates book straight into your calendar via Cal.com. A calendar invite is attached to every email automatically.

⚡

Drag and drop pipeline

Applied, Shortlisted, Voice Sent, Interview Booked. Move candidates through your pipeline in one click or drag.

👤

Candidate profiles

Full profile with skills, qualifications, employment history and voice note playback all in one place.

🔊

Custom voice and personality

Choose your voice from ElevenLabs, adjust the tone, energy and pacing to match your brand. Sounds like your team, not a robot.

🔒

24-hour interview links

Every link expires after 24 hours creating genuine urgency. Candidates who click late see a branded page with your contact details.
